headline: Part-time Hiring
description: Tapy helps restaurants find high-quality staff instantly, and helps candidates find part-time jobs matching their language skills.
forWorkersDesc: Find high-paying jobs based on your language skills. Flexible shifts, transparent pay.
forOwnersDesc: Post jobs and find the right staff in minutes. Easy management.
fastReliableDesc: Reliability scoring and identity verification ensure quality for both parties.
step1Desc: Register and complete your profile with language skills
step2Desc: Browse jobs or post job openings
step3Desc: Get matched with quality candidates or employers
joinNow: Join thousands of workers and restaurants on Tapy
howItWorksDesc: Just 3 simple steps to start earning
step1Desc2: Create an account in 1 minute. Verify your identity and get started.
step2Desc2: Filter by location, language, schedule. Apply instantly with one tap.
step3Desc2: Complete your shift and receive fast, secure payment.
jobCategoriesDesc: Find jobs that match your skills and interests
ctaDesc: Join thousands of workers and restaurants using Tapy to connect job opportunities.
